## Summary / 摘要

Describe the change and its user-visible impact.

请说明本次修改以及对用户可见的影响。

## Validation / 验证

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] Platform-specific checks when packaging or native code changed
- [ ] 涉及打包或原生代码时，已完成对应平台检查

## Checklist / 检查清单

- [ ] The pull request is focused on one coherent change.
- [ ] Documentation has been updated when behavior or setup changed.
- [ ] No credentials, keys, certificates, keystores, or generated output were committed.
- [ ] 本次 Pull Request 只包含一组紧密相关的修改。
- [ ] 功能或配置发生变化时，已同步更新文档。
- [ ] 未提交账号凭据、key、证书、keystore 或生成目录。
